creator: howardjp@wam.umd.edu
text:
Party is a simple multi-user chat system developed in the early- and
mid-1980s for use on freenets (Chinet and M-Net being the biggies).
Myself and several others still use this software daily for
communications on a variety of hosts.  At their request, I have
prepared a FreeBSD Port of the software.

How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
